rotated_tile_label: The library image is divided into lettered tiles. One tile has been rotated. Which lettered tile is rotated?
The library scene is split into lettered tiles. Identify the tile that has been rotated.

swapped_tile_pair_label: The library image is divided into numbered cells, and exactly two cells have been swapped. Which option names the swapped pair?
Two numbered cells in the library grid are out of place. Select the option naming those two cells.

Exactly two cells of the library image changed places. Choose the option naming the swapped cells.
Select the lettered option that names the two swapped cells in the library grid.
missing_patch_label: Which option exactly fills the missing region?
Select the option that restores the missing part of the library image.

Choose the patch option that completes the library illustration.
